gradient_confidence_conclusion: Real gradient (+1.95pp) is best, frozen (+1.79pp) close, nogradient (+1.29pp) also significant. Gradient confidence adds ~0.5pp but is not the primary signal.
dropout_schedule_conclusion: Wider dropout range [0,0.10,0.15,0.20,0.30] best (+2.03pp). Narrow [0,0.05,0.10] weakest (+1.06pp). Moderate dropout spread is important.
runtime_summary: StabilityResidual-frozen: 9.2s (4.0x Feature-only). Feature-only: 2.3s. GCN-Jaccard: 2.8s. MCGC: 6.2s. GraGE-Hybrid: 3.9s.
